title: Islands Overworld
description: Switch the generation of the vanilla world to flying islands.
body:
Islands Overworld is a worldgen datapack that changes the generation of the vanilla world to flying islands. Although nothing else changes, the adventure becomes significantly more difficult due to the void domination. ### If you prefer to add a new dimension, instead of replacing the overworld, look at [Islands Overworld Dimension](https://modrinth.com/datapack/islands-overworld-dimension). ## Installation - Play Minecraft 1.20 or more recent. - Make sure to download the exact corresponding datapacks's version (worldgen can mess up real quick) - Create a new world and drag the datapack upon world’s creation. - Make sure the spawn is correct. ## Islands intensities (Patreon feature) You can chose islands intensity between 5 values: tiny, small, medium, large and massive. A different datapack can be downloaded for each intensity.
Patreon Supporters - **26.1 (10/04/2026):** Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.11 (28/01/2026):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.9 (11/10/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, varinyc, Setsu-P, Wani P, Lionel Felke - **1.21.2 (2024-11-29):** Delivator, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, varinyc, Setsu-P, Maximilian Adler, ODS, Jamie B - **1.21 (2024-07-04):** 아아앨, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Aidan McCreary, Azerxim, Setsu-P, Gaming Grotto, Kobe Prokopetz - **1.20.5+ (2024-06-10):** 아아앨, EXcore, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, Setsu-P - **1.20.4 (2023-12-27):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **Mineshafts & Ancient Cities (2023-09-19):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Eleanor Blackwood, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, TerfyHorizon - **1.20 (2023-06-08):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, John Stampe, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie, Deadlot3, Darklad32 - **Legacy 1.19.2 (2023-06-04):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie - **V1 (2023-04-05):** Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
